message:
feat(dashboard): add POST /api/vm/create endpoint for creating VMs

Adds HTTP endpoint that accepts JSON with repo, ref, name, cpus, memory_mb,
and env fields. Provides sensible defaults (main branch, 2 CPUs, 4GB RAM).
Returns task ID and status on success.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
